igbo.deep_808_style_sub_bass: Sub bass miri emi nke ụdị 808
igbo.barry_harris_1929_2021_codified_bebop_: Barry Harris (1929-2021) hazichara harmony nke bebop. Usoro ya na-eji 6th chords kama 7ths ma na-agbakwụnye diminished passing chords n'etiti ọkwa scale maka iduzi olu nke ọma.
igbo.attack_time_to_reach_full_volume_decay: Attack: oge iji ruo volume zuru oke. Decay: oge iji gbadaa na sustain. Sustain: ọkwa volume a na-ejide. Release: oge ọ na-agbaze mgbe a hapụsịrị key.
igbo.a_scale_is_an_ordered_set_of_pitches_m: Scale bụ setịpụ pitches ahaziri ahazi. Modes bụ ntụgharị nke scale nke na-amalite na ọkwa dị iche iche. Nke ọ bụla na-emepụta ọnọdụ mmetụta dị iche.
igbo.chords_are_built_by_stacking_intervals: A na-ewu chords site n'ịkwakọba intervals (3rds). Major na-eji major 3rd + minor 3rd. Minor na-atụgharị ha. Extended chords na-agbakwụnye 7ths, 9ths, na karịa.
igbo.kicks_use_a_sine_oscillator_with_a_pit: Kicks na-eji sine oscillator nwere pitch sweep. Snares na-agwakọta noise (filtered) + tone body. Hi-hats na-eji high-pass filtered noise bursts.
igbo.4_4_4_quarter_note_beats_per_bar_most_: 4/4 = quarter-note beats 4 kwa bar (nke a na-ahụkarị). 3/4 = mmetụta waltz. 6/8 = compound duple. 5/4 na 7/8 na-emepụta grooves na-enweghị nhata, mba ọzọ.
igbo.keys_arranged_by_ascending_5ths_clockw: A haziri keys site na 5ths na-arịgo na-eso elekere. Keys agbata obi na-ekekọrịta note 6 n'ime 7. Ịga na-eso elekere na-agbakwụnye sharps; megide elekere na-agbakwụnye flats.
igbo.every_musical_sound_contains_overtones: Ụda egwu ọ bụla nwere overtones n'elu fundamental. Ike ha metụtara na-ekpebi timbre — nke a mere trumpet ji ada dị iche na flute na otu pitch.
igbo.an_interval_is_the_distance_between_tw: Interval bụ anya dị n'etiti pitches abụọ, a na-atụ ya na semitones. Frequency ratio na-ekpebi consonance (ratios dị mfe dịka 3:2 na-ada nke ọma).
igbo.plays_chord_notes_one_at_a_time_in_seq: Na-akpọ notes nke chord otu n'otu n'usoro. Elu = site n'ala gaa n'elu, Ala = site n'elu gaa n'ala. Na-emepụta patterns na-asọ site na chords kwụ ọtọ.
igbo.a_filter_removes_frequencies_above_low: Filter na-ewepụ frequencies dị n'elu (lowpass), n'okpuru (highpass), ma ọ bụ gburugburu (bandpass) cutoff frequency. Resonance (Q) na-abawanye frequencies dị nso na cutoff, na-emepụta peak.
igbo.tremolo_periodic_volume_changes_amplit: Tremolo: mgbanwe volume oge niile (amplitude modulation). Vibrato: mgbanwe pitch oge niile (frequency modulation). A na-eji LFO (Low Frequency Oscillator) achịkwa ha abụọ.
igbo.discovered_in_1983_a_noise_burst_feeds: A chọpụtara ya na 1983. Noise burst na-abanye n'ime delay line dị mkpụmkpụ nke nwere feedback. Delay time na-ekpebi pitch. Filter dị na feedback loop na-achịkwa ìhè na decay. Na-eṣepụ plucked strings n'ụzọ eke.
igbo.the_sequencer_is_a_composition_tool_ea: Sequencer bụ ngwá ọrụ mmebe. Nzọụkwụ ọ bụla na-anọchi anya subdivision nke beat. Ahịrị melody na-edozi pitched notes, drums na-agbakwụnye rhythm. Musical notation na-egosi ihe ị na-emepụta.
igbo.notes_on_lines_and_spaces_represent_pi: Notes dị n'ahịrị na oghere na-anọchi anya pitches. A na-egosi ogologo oge site n'ụdị note: whole (○), half (𝅗𝅥), quarter (♩), eighth (♪). Staff nwere ahịrị 5.
igbo.equal_temperament_12_notes_per_octave_: Equal temperament: notes 12 kwa octave, ratio 2^(1/12). A4 = 440 Hz; A5 = 880 Hz. Well-Tempered Clavier nke Bach (1722) mere ka ụwa kwenye na nkwekọrịta a. Note ọ bụla ị na-akpọ ebe a dị na grid ahụ.
igbo.major_w_w_h_w_w_w_h_minor_w_h_w_w_h_w_: Major: W-W-H-W-W-W-H. Minor: W-H-W-W-H-W-W. Modes 7 (Ionian, Dorian, Phrygian, Lydian, Mixolydian, Aeolian, Locrian) na-esite n'ịtụgharị interval pattern nke major scale.
igbo.triads_root_third_fifth_major_4_3_semi: Triads: root + third + fifth. Major (4+3 semitones), minor (3+4), diminished (3+3), augmented (4+4). 7th chords na-agbakwụnye third ọzọ. Pop music = ~chords 6 na-emegharị; jazz na-eji extensions na substitutions.
igbo.sustained_chord_textures_the_bed_under: Sustained chord textures — ihe ndina n'okpuru ihe fọrọ nke nta ka ọ bụrụ cinematic score ọ bụla. Nwaa iv-V-i na minor, ma ọ bụ i-VI-VII maka mmetụta Hans Zimmer. Drones na fifths na-akwado egwu oge gboo India na omenala bagpipe.
igbo.most_popular_music_sits_at_4_4_90_130_: Ọtụtụ egwu ewu ewu dị na 4/4, 90-130 BPM. Hip-hop ~85-95, house 120-130, drum-and-bass ~170 (mmetụta half-time). Kick na 1+3, snare na 2+4 = backbeat — ntọala rock + pop.
igbo.theory_the_math_behind_the_sound: Theory — mgbakọ na mwepụ n'azụ ụda
igbo.pythagoras_500_bce_discovered_consonan: Pythagoras (~500 BCE) chọpụtara consonance site na integer frequency ratios: octave 2:1, fifth 3:2, fourth 4:3. Helmholtz gbasapụrụ nke a na 1862. Ụda = compression waves; egwu = patterns anyị kwetara ịkpọ mara mma.
igbo.full_chord_grid_strum_plate_and_voice_: Chord grid zuru oke, strum plate, na voice presets
igbo.drag_across_strings_to_strum: Dọkpụrụ n'ofe strings ka ị strum!
igbo.frequency_modulation_fm_synthesis_uses: Frequency Modulation (FM) synthesis na-eji oscillator otu (modulator) gbanwee frequency nke ọzọ (carrier) ngwa ngwa. Ratio modulator:carrier na-ekpebi harmonic content. Ratios dị mfe (1:1, 2:1, 3:1) na-emepụta harmonic tones. Ratios mgbagwoju anya na-emepụta metallic, bell-like, ma ọ bụ inharmonic sounds. Yamaha DX7 mere ka FM mara amara na 1983.
igbo.supersaw_stacks_multiple_sawtooth_osci: SuperSaw na-akwakọba ọtụtụ sawtooth oscillators nke a detune ntakịrị site na ibe ha. Nke a na-emepụta nnukwu, sara mbara, ụda na-egbuke egbuke — akara EDM, trance, na pop nke oge a. Ọtụtụ voices = na-esiwanye ike mana na-eji CPU karịa. Detuning na-achịkwa ka voices si dị anya na tuning — detune karịa = sara mbara/dịka chorus karịa, ntakịrị = siri ike/na-elekwasị anya karịa.
igbo.an_arpeggiator_plays_the_notes_of_a_ch: 🔬 Arpeggiator na-akpọ notes nke chord otu n'otu n'usoro. "Elu" na-esite n'ala gaa n'elu, na-emepụta ike na-arịgo. "Ala" na-agbada maka mmetụta mmiri ọdịda. Ọsọ na-achịkwa ọsọ (ntakịrị = ngwa ngwa). Gate na-achịkwa ogologo oge note ọ bụla na-ada (100% = legato, 10% = staccato). Nwaa ọsọ=100ms + octaves 4 + up pattern maka classic trance arp!
igbo.sing_speak_or_play_an_instrument_hear_: Bụọ abụ, kwuo okwu, ma ọ bụ kpọọ ngwá egwu — nụ effects na oge ozugbo!
igbo.how_effects_change_sound_waves: 🔬 Ka Effects Si Agbanwe Sound Waves
igbo.removes_frequencies_above_lowpass_or_b: Na-ewepụ frequencies dị n'elu (lowpass) ma ọ bụ n'okpuru (highpass) threshold. Dịka iji aka kpuchie ọnụ — frequencies dị elu na-apụ, ụda na-aghọ "gbara ọchịchịrị" karịa.
igbo.creates_echoes_by_copying_the_signal_a: Na-emepụta echoes site n'idetu signal na ịkpọ ya ọzọ mgbe obere oge gasịrị. Feedback na-achịkwa ọnụ ọgụgụ echoes na-emegharị.
igbo.simulates_room_acoustics_by_creating_t: Na-eṣepụ acoustics ọnụ ụlọ site n'imepụta ọtụtụ puku obere echoes na-agwakọta ọnụ. Obere ọnụ ụlọ = reverb dị mkpụmkpụ, katidral = reverb ogologo.
igbo.clips_the_waveform_peaks_turning_smoot: Na-ebipụ peaks nke waveform, na-atụgharị sine waves dị nro ka ọ bụrụ ụdị siri ike, nwere nkuku. Nke a na-agbakwụnye harmonics ọhụrụ nke na-adịghị na ụda mbụ.
igbo.duplicates_the_signal_with_a_slight_co: Na-edetu signal na obere delay na-agbanwe mgbe niile. Nke a na-eṣepụ ọtụtụ voices/ngwá egwu na-akpọ ọnụ na-enweghị nhata ntakịrị.
igbo.rapidly_varies_the_volume_up_and_down_: Na-agbanwe volume elu na ala ngwa ngwa, na-emepụta mmetụta na-akụ. Nke a na-ahụkarị na surf guitar na egwu organ.
igbo.use_headphones_when_monitoring_to_avoi: Jiri headphones mgbe ị na-elele iji zere feedback loops! Mic na-agafe effects niile dị n'elu (filter, delay, reverb, wdg.) — dozie ha ka ị nụ ka nke ọ bụla si agbanwe olu gị ma ọ bụ ngwá egwu gị.
igbo.connect_your_microphone_to_run_your_vo: Jikọọ microphone gị iji gbaa olu gị ma ọ bụ ngwá egwu gị site na effects chain na oge ozugbo.
igbo.see_your_voice_as_a_waveform_frequency: Lee olu gị dịka waveform + frequency spectrum. Nụ ka filter, delay, reverb, distortion, na chorus si agbanwe sound waves n'anụ ahụ.
igbo.touch_drag_x_pitch_y_filter_effect: Metụ & dọkpụrụ — X = pitch, Y = filter/effect
igbo.the_xy_pad_maps_your_finger_mouse_posi: XY pad na-eserịta ọnọdụ mkpịsị aka/mouse gị na musical parameters na oge ozugbo. X axis na-achịkwa pitch (aka ekpe = ala, aka nri = elu). Y axis na-achịkwa filter cutoff frequency (elu = ìhè, ala = ọchịchịrị). Nke a yiri ngwá egwu dịka Korg Kaoss Pad, nke gbanwere live electronic music performance site n'ịtụgharị 2D gestures ka ọ bụrụ ụda.
igbo.xy_performance_pad_left_right_is_pitch: XY performance pad. Aka ekpe–aka nri bụ pitch, elu–ala bụ filter brightness. Jiri arrow keys ịkwaga ma kpọọ note; pịa Escape ma ọ bụ Space ịkwụsị.
igbo.sequencer_drum_pads_notation_samples_m: Sequencer, drum pads, notation, samples & karịa →
igbo.click_cells_to_place_notes_visual_melo: Pịa cells itinye notes — visual melody editor
igbo.common_progressions_click_to_hear: Progressions ndị a na-ahụkarị — pịa ịnụ
igbo.chord_progressions_create_emotional_jo: Chord progressions na-emepụta njem mmetụta. Chord I (tonic) na-adị ka 'ụlọ.' Chord V (dominant) na-emepụta nrụgide nke chọrọ ịlaghachi na I. Chord vi (relative minor) na-agbakwụnye mwute ma ọ bụ omimi. Chord IV (subdominant) na-esi n'ụlọ pụọ nwayọ. A na-atụ anya na I-V-vi-IV progression na-apụta n'ihe karịrị 70% nke abụ pop n'ihi na ọ na-ahazi mmetụta ndị a nke ọma.
igbo.roman_numerals_i_ii_iii_iv_v_vi_vii_re: Ọnụọgụ Roman (I, ii, iii, IV, V, vi, vii°) na-anọchi anya ọkwa scale. Mkpụrụedemede ukwu = major chord. Mkpụrụedemede nta = minor chord.
igbo.add_melody_notes_in_the_grid_above: Tinye melody notes na grid dị n'elu ↑
igbo.click_melody_cells_in_the_grid_above_t: Pịa melody cells na grid dị n'elu ka ị hụ notation ebe a
igbo.held_for_a_full_bar: Ejidere ya maka bar zuru oke
igbo.click_challenge_me_to_practice_rhythm_: Pịa "Maa m aka!" iji zụọ patterns rhythm
igbo.upload_wav_mp3_files_for_custom_pads_s: Bulite faịlụ WAV/MP3 maka custom pads. Samples na-ehichapụ mgbe emelitere ibe.
igbo.chain_patterns_into_a_full_song: Jikọọ patterns ka ọ bụrụ abụ zuru oke
igbo.add_current_pattern_as_a_section: Tinye pattern ugbu a dịka section
igbo.add_current_as_section: + Tinye Nke Ugbu a dịka Section
igbo.create_a_drum_pattern_in_the_grid_abov: Mepụta drum pattern na grid dị n'elu, wee pịa "+ Tinye Nke Ugbu a dịka Section" ịmalite iwu abụ.
igbo.sections_intro_verse_chorus_bridge_cho: Sections: Intro → Verse → Chorus → Bridge → Chorus → Outro
igbo.no_saved_beats_yet_create_a_pattern_an: Enweghị beats echekwara. Mepụta pattern ma pịa Chekwaa!
igbo.harmonypad_creates_warm_pure_tones_by_: HarmonyPad na-emepụta warm, tones ọcha site n'ịgwakọta sine na triangle waves. Họrọ voice, were chord site na grid dị n'okpuru, wee strum plate!
igbo.chord_grid_tap_to_select_space_to_stru: 🎶 Chord Grid — metụ ịhọrọ, Space ịstrum
igbo.strum_plate_tap_or_drag_across: 🎸 Strum Plate — metụ ma ọ bụ dọkpụrụ n'elu ya
igbo.hear_see_the_waveform_and_learn_the_st: Nụ, lee waveform, ma mụta akụkọ nke ngwá egwu ọ bụla
igbo.this_is_how_different_instruments_get_: Otu a ka ngwá egwu dị iche iche si enweta ụda pụrụ iche ha! Ọjà bụ ihe ka ukwuu harmonic 1 (sine). Clarinet nwere odd harmonics (1,3,5,7). Violin nwere ha niile. Pịa iwu timbre nke gị!
igbo.karplus_strong_synthesis_creates_reali: Karplus-Strong synthesis na-emepụta ụda plucked string n'ezie site n'iji obere noise burst nke a na-eziga na delay line nwere filtered feedback. Dozie brightness ( agba noise mbụ) na damping (ogologo sustain) iji kpụọ àgwà string.
igbo.identify_each_note_in_the_4_note_melod: Chọpụta note ọ bụla na melody note 4:
igbo.strong_high_harmonics_pierces_sparkles: High harmonics siri ike — na-amị / na-egbuke.
igbo.fundamental_heavy_gentle_highs_acousti: Fundamental dị arọ, highs dị nro. Dịka acoustic.
igbo.mid_heavy_without_fundamental_woody_cu: Mid dị arọ na-enweghị fundamental — dịka osisi/cuckoo flute.
igbo.almost_pure_fundamental_muffled_sub_li: Ihe fọrọ nke nta ka ọ bụrụ pure fundamental — kpuchiri / dịka sub.
igbo.roughly_equal_harmonics_full_natural_t: Harmonics fọrọ nke nta ka ọ hara — zuru oke / timbre eke.
igbo.adjust_fundamental_mid_and_high_harmon: Dozie ọkwa harmonic nke fundamental, mid, na high. Widget na-ekewa ụda n'ime otu n'ime timbre ise dị iche. Enweghị score, enweghị ngosipụta — naanị sweep ma hụ.
igbo.hypothesis_free_text_which_harmonic_le: Echiche (ederede efu): Kedu harmonic level na-ekpebi "ìhè" na "warm"?
igbo.hold_two_sliders_steady_move_one_watch: Jide sliders abụọ kwụ ọtọ. Kwaga otu. Lee.
igbo.find_two_settings_producing_the_same_t: Chọta ntọala abụọ na-emepụta timbre otu. Kedu ruru ha na-ekekọrịta?
igbo.real_instruments_have_characteristic_s: Ngwá egwu n'ezie nwere spectra pụrụ iche. Chọpụta ihe mere ọjà ji ada dị iche na violin.
igbo.explain_how_harmonic_content_determine: Kọwaa ka harmonic content si ekpebi mmụba timbre.
igbo.design_note_discrete_5_class_timbre_ma: Ihe ndetu imewe: timbre marker klas 5 dị iche; enweghị acoustic fidelity score; enweghị ngosipụta — n'ụzọ ekwesịrị ekwesị.
igbo.using_simple_everyday_words_and_short_: site n'iji okwu dị mfe nke kwa ụbọchị na ahịrịokwu dị mkpụmkpụ, na-enweghị jargon
igbo.for_a_5th_grade_student_brief_and_frie: maka nwa akwụkwọ klas 5, n'obere na enyi
igbo.for_a_student_who_already_knows_some_m: maka nwa akwụkwọ mara ụfọdụ music theory
igbo.click_explain_for_the_ai_tutor_to_desc: Pịa "Kọwaa" ka AI tutor kọwaa ihe view a na-akụzi na ọkwa ọgụgụ ị họọrọ.
igbo.harmonic_series_why_instruments_sound_: 🎵 Harmonic Series — Ihe mere ngwá egwu ji ada dị iche
